findings: Bwd Packet Length Max exhibits low cardinality and near-constant values across classes, indicating limited variability.
Bwd Packet Length Std also shows low cardinality, suggesting constrained variation in backward packet length dispersion.
Bwd Packet Length Mean demonstrates high class separation in distribution, confirming structural differences between BENIGN and DDoS classes.
Overall, backward packet length features show significant class-conditioned structural variation with differing variance ratios and unique value counts.
